description_long: This is a modern two-story house with a mix of flat and gently sloped rooflines, featuring a combination of tan and white exterior finishes. The front facade includes a prominent driveway, a small porch area, and large windows that allow ample natural light into the interior. The house has a spacious green lawn in front and a paved walkway leading to the main entrance. The rear of the house showcases multiple balconies and large glass doors, suggesting access to outdoor living spaces. The side elevations reveal a blend of solid wall sections and window groupings, with one side featuring a deck or patio area. The overall design emphasizes clean lines, geometric forms, and a functional layout suitable for suburban or urban neighborhoods.
description: A modern two-story house with tan and white finishes, large windows, and a mix of flat and sloped roofs. Features include a driveway, porch, balconies, and spacious green lawn.
description_view_0: Front view showing the driveway, main entrance, porch, and large windows with a green lawn.
description_view_1: Side view highlighting the solid tan wall, partial view of the driveway, and the lawn extending along the side.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying multiple balconies, large glass doors, and a deck or patio area.
description_view_3: Opposite side view with a mix of windows and solid wall, and a clear view of the driveway and lawn.
attribute_window_arrangement: asymmetrical placement with large picture windows and bay windows
attribute_entryway_design: Main entryway features a small porch, steps, and a modern door with large glass panels, flanked by windows and a paved driveway.
